main.description: A short exchange among the seven robot tellers of the Book of Sand (borges.mino.mobi) in the moments before a telling — the teller and the two in that watch's foregrounded tension trading a few lines, rising with the lunar phase and glancing at the tale to come. A model renders it from the deterministic frame spec for page n; the first render is frozen here so the lead-in stays stable. rkey is the page number n as a string.

n.description: The page number; matches the rkey and the deterministic frame spec.

phase.description: The lunar phase of the watch (waxing / full / waning / dark).

pair.description: The two tellers in tension this watch.

lines.description: The exchange, in order; the last line is the teller taking up the watch.
